Hello! Welcome back to Support Beauty. How can I assist you today?

Our support hours are Monday to Friday, from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM local business time [1]. If you need assistance outside these hours, you can email us at support@supportbeauty.example or call +1-800-555-0130 during business hours [2][3]. How else may I assist you today?
Can you help me with refund?
I don't have enough verified information in our support knowledge to answer that confidently. Please rephrase your question or contact the human support team for help.
Can you help me with refund?

I understand you would like help with a refund. For refund requests, I need to connect you with our human support team who can assist you further. You can reach them by emailing support@supportbeauty.example or calling +1-800-555-0130 during our support hours, Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Let me know if you need assistance with anything else!

Sources: [1] [2] [3]

Yes, our human support team is dedicated to assisting with refund requests and will guide you through the process. Please contact them via email at support@supportbeauty.example or by phone at +1-800-555-0130 during our support hours, Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. If you need help with anything else, feel free to ask!
